scope: Promote saved Battle Command sketch points into FrontlineGeometryAdjustment.sketchLines
Preview saved plan-set sketch geometry in Deployment
Apply the plan set and rehydrate Deployment-facing sketch shape state
Desktop QA only; mobile/cellphone is outside the current target
flow: Reset campaign and entered Army Camp, Deployment, then Battle Command.
Entered 3-point Battle Command frontline sketch for the selected Forest Left Line and confirmed it.
Saved the selected frontline standing order from Battle Command.
Verified saved battle sketch polyline count 1 and battle log contained multi-point sketch update.
Retreated, applied After Action, reloaded the app, and returned to Deployment.
Verified Deployment showed saved-order shape text: 戦線形状 3点 / X52 Y28 -> X24 Y34 -> X58 Y42.
Verified Deployment plan-save note: 計画セット保存時に戦線形状 1線を含める。
Saved a standing-order plan set and verified the row summary contained 形状1線.
Opened plan-set content preview and verified 保存戦線形状 森林左翼線 3点.
Applied the plan set and verified Deployment still exposed 形状3点 / 戦線形状 3点 and the saved shape preview.
notes: This stores saved sketch frontage as segment-scoped geometry in plan sets. It is not a full arbitrary freehand terrain-painting editor.
Browser automation became slow on the large Deployment page, so clicks were verified with targeted DOM evidence and visible text after each major state change.
Mobile QA was skipped because the current target excludes cellphone/mobile.
